name: Orford Mining Corp
description: Orford Mining Corporation is a mineral resource company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of base and precious metal assets. The company is primarily engaged in exploring highly prospective and underexplored areas of Northern Quebec, including its Qiqavik and Joutel District projects, as well as nickel exploration at its West Raglan project. Orford Mining is a Canada-based explorer that was recently acquired by Alamos Gold Inc. to further consolidate its interests in the region's mineral potential.
